arts.ttl: In-depth exclusive with Johnnie Jackson: AFC Wimbledon challenges have made me a better manager
arts.sum: “We had a really young and inexperienced squad, which I felt was part of the reason why the club had got relegated the previous season, and one of the first things I did was try and address that and bring in some experience. “I’m the first person to manage Wimbledon who’s had no previous affiliation with the club, so I don’t think they quite knew me or got me,” admits Jackson.

Wimbledon have failed to win at home for their last three games, drawing one and losing two. Walsall have lost just once in their last six away games, the Saddlers did not play last weekend due to in...
